Arguments.Name: String1
Arguments.Tooltip: First input string. This tool is designed for applications where prefixes are significant, like comparing first names, surnames, or other identifier strings.

Arguments.Name: String2
Arguments.Tooltip: Second input string. This tool is designed for applications where prefixes are significant, like comparing first names, surnames, or other identifier strings.

Arguments.Name: DissimilarSymbolList
Arguments.Tooltip: List of symbols that are different between two strings

Arguments.Name: JWDistance
Arguments.Tooltip:
Jaro-Winkler Distance output as double. A higher Jaro-Winkler distance (closer to 1) means the strings are more similar, especially if they share a common prefix.
A lower Jaro-Winkler distance (closer to 0) means the strings are less similar.
